name: Sunflower Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven to the temperature specified in the recipe.
2. In a large bowl, combine the water, vegetable oil, honey, and salt.
3. Add the oats, whole wheat flour, bread flour, and yeast to the wet ingredients.
4. Mix all the ingredients together until well combined.
5. Fold in the sunflower seeds and raisins.
6. Pour the mixture into your breadpan.
7. Bake according to the recipe's instructions.
8. Remove the bread from the oven when it is done baking.
